plugins.name: rockstarr-content-bot
plugins.description: Rockstarr AI long-form drafting plugin. Ideates blog/newsletter/article topics from the client's profile, style guide, and knowledge base, then drafts in the client's approved voice. Blog posts use an outline-first two-step flow. Every output is first-party grounded and lands in 03_drafts/content/ for human review.

plugins.name: rockstarr-infra
plugins.description: Rockstarr AI infrastructure plugin. Scaffolds the per-client folder, ingests the workbook, generates the style guide, runs the knowledge base, and exposes shared utilities every Rockstarr bot depends on.

plugins.name: rockstarr-outreach-salesnav
plugins.description: Rockstarr AI LinkedIn outreach plugin for clients who will not install Interceptly / MeetAlfred / Dripify / Waalaxy. Plans multi-touch campaigns against a client-supplied ICP and saved Sales Navigator search, executes the daily outreach loop directly in Sales Nav via Chrome MCP, and keeps all state in a single workbook inside /rockstarr-ai/. Enforces a 20/day + 100/week connection cap across campaigns, routes every reply through rockstarr-reply for approval, and confirms the browser is signed in to the correct LinkedIn before every run.
